warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 8
12 Pistols
3-5 BMU
50 Double Unders

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
12 Hollow Rocks
EMOM x 5 mins (04:00)
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
EMOM x 5 (09:00)
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5 (14:00-19:00)
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate
EMOM X 4
Beat Swing x 10
Bigger Beat swing - Push down on bar
Hips to bar
Floor Arch Turn Over
Banded BMU OR BMU

hypertrophy.reasoning: Pistols and BMU heavily tax lower body and lats; target antagonists and horizontal plane muscles to balance.
